data.name: CmdPalette_Hint
data.value: â†‘â†“ navigate Â· Enter select Â· Esc close

data.name: Profile_AvatarColourHint
data.value: Choose a colour for your avatar circle.

data.name: Profile_LanguagePreferencesHint
data.value: Control which languages the Engine uses for metadata lookups and which content languages are accepted without review.

data.name: Profile_DisplayLanguageHelper
data.value: Language for UI labels and Wikidata display

data.name: Profile_MetadataLanguageHelper
data.value: Language for provider queries and Wikidata lookups

data.name: Profile_AdditionalContentLanguagesHelper
data.value: Languages you consume content in â€” files in these languages won't be flagged

data.name: Profile_AcceptAnyLanguageHint
data.value: When enabled, files in any language are ingested without review flags. Disable this to restrict accepted languages to your display, metadata, and additional languages.

data.name: Profile_CouldNotSaveProfile
data.value: Could not save profile â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Models_AiModelsDescription
data.value: Download, load, and manage the local AI models that power intelligent features. Models run entirely on your machine â€” no data leaves.

data.name: Models_NoBenchmarkData
data.value: No benchmark data yet â€” the Engine will benchmark automatically on first startup.

data.name: Models_IdleAutoUnloadTimeoutHelper
data.value: Unload model from RAM after this many seconds of inactivity.

data.name: Models_CpuInferenceActive
data.value: CPU inference active. A dedicated GPU (NVIDIA, AMD, or Intel Arc) enables 6-7Ã— faster inference.

data.name: AiFeatures_AiFeaturesDescription
data.value: Enable or disable individual AI-powered features. Changes take effect immediately for future operations â€” they do not reprocess already-ingested files.

data.name: AiFeatures_IngestionDescription
data.value: Runs automatically during file ingestion. Every new file benefits from these features without any user action.

data.name: AiFeatures_EnrichmentDescription
data.value: Runs in the background after ingestion, when the Engine is idle. Adds depth and personality to your library without blocking other work.

data.name: AiFeatures_OnDemandDescription
data.value: Activated by user actions â€” a search query, a button click, or browsing a work's detail page. Fast responses expected.

data.name: AiFeatures_ScheduledDescription
data.value: Runs on a nightly or weekly cron schedule. These features are long-running and are designed to run while you sleep.

data.name: Schedule_AiScheduleDescription
data.value: Configure when each background AI job runs. Changes take effect after the Engine restarts.

data.name: Schedule_ItemsPending
data.value: items pending â€” processed in background batches

data.name: Schedule_NoItemsInQueue
data.value: No items in the enrichment queue yet. Add media to your library to begin.

data.name: Schedule_ChangesRequireRestart
data.value: Changes require an Engine restart to take effect.

data.name: Libraries_NotAvailableDescription
data.value: Library folder settings are not available on this device. Please use the web or mobile interface to configure your library.

data.name: Libraries_FileOrganizationHint
data.value: Click a field to append it to the path. Use / to separate folders. Text outside braces is literal.

data.name: Libraries_CannotReachEngine
data.value: Cannot reach the Engine â€” please make sure it is running.

data.name: Libraries_WatchFolderNotAccessible
data.value: Watch Folder is not accessible â€” please check the path and permissions.

data.name: Libraries_LibraryFolderNotAccessible
data.value: Library Folder is not accessible â€” please check the path and permissions.

data.name: Libraries_InvalidTemplate
data.value: Invalid template â€” please check your tokens.

data.name: Libraries_CouldNotSaveFolderSettings
data.value: Could not save folder settings â€” please make sure the Engine is running.

data.name: Libraries_ConfiguredLibrariesHint
data.value: Libraries defined in config/libraries.json. Each library can span multiple source paths across different drives. Edit the config file directly to add or modify libraries.

data.name: Status_StatusDashboardDescription
data.value: A live overview of Engine health, library size, and storage usage.

data.name: Security_SecurityDescription
data.value: Control how the Engine accepts connections and enforces authentication.

data.name: Security_LocalhostBypassDescription
data.value: Allow unauthenticated requests from this machine

data.name: Security_RequireHttpsDescription
data.value: Reject non-HTTPS requests from other devices on the network

data.name: ApiKeys_GuestApiKeysDescription
data.value: Any application connecting to the Engine â€” Radarr, Sonarr, a mobile app â€” must present a valid Guest API Key. Each key is labelled and can be revoked individually.

data.name: ApiKeys_NoKeysIssued
data.value: No Guest API Keys have been issued yet. Generate one to allow external connections.

data.name: ApiKeys_CopyKeyNow
data.value: Copy this key now â€” it will not be shown again.

data.name: ApiKeys_RevokeAllConfirmation2
data.value: Guest API Keys immediately. Any application currently connected to the Engine will lose access.

data.name: ApiKeys_CouldNotGenerateKey
data.value: Could not generate key â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: ApiKeys_RevokeFailed
data.value: Revoke failed â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: ApiKeys_CouldNotRevokeKeys
data.value: Could not revoke keys â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Users_PageDescription
data.value: Manage the profiles that have access to this Tuvima Library instance. The seed profile (Owner) cannot be deleted.

data.name: Users_NoProfiles
data.value: No profiles found. Create one to get started.

data.name: Users_CreateError
data.value: Could not create profile â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Users_DeleteError
data.value: Could not delete profile â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Activity_PageDescription
data.value: A complete record of every significant action taken by the Engine â€” ingestion, enrichment, review resolutions, and scheduled maintenance.

data.name: Activity_NoEntries
data.value: No activity entries match the current filter.

data.name: Activity_PruneError
data.value: Prune failed â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Maintenance_PageDescription
data.value: Housekeeping tools for library integrity and periodic metadata refresh.

data.name: Maintenance_ReconciliationDescription
data.value: Scan all library assets and verify their files still exist on disk. Missing files are cleaned up automatically â€” orphaned cover art, sidecar XML, and empty folders are removed.

data.name: Maintenance_UniverseEnrichmentDescription
data.value: Run deep enrichment for all pending items â€” character relationships, franchise connections, and cross-media narrative links.

data.name: Maintenance_LibraryCrawlDescription
data.value: Scan the Library Root for library.xml sidecars and rebuild the database from the filesystem. Coming in a future update.

data.name: Maintenance_WeeklySyncDescription
data.value: Periodic metadata refresh with artwork hash verification. Coming in a future update.

data.name: Maintenance_ReconciliationComplete
data.value: Reconciliation complete â€” all files present

data.name: Maintenance_ReconciliationError
data.value: Reconciliation failed â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Maintenance_Pass2Error
data.value: Failed to trigger Pass 2 â€” is the Engine running?

data.name: Setup_PageDescription
data.value: Revisit the initial setup steps or review your current server configuration at a glance.

data.name: Setup_RerunDescription
data.value: Walk through library path selection, provider configuration, and AI model download again. Your existing library data is never touched.

data.name: Connectivity_ComingSoon
data.value: Feature in Development â€” Network and sync settings will appear here in a future update.

data.name: ServerGeneral_ServerIdentityDescription
data.value: The server name appears in network discovery (mDNS/Bonjour) so other apps on your home network can find your library by name.

data.name: ServerGeneral_ServerNameHelper
data.value: Visible to media apps on your local network

data.name: ServerGeneral_RegionalSettingsDescription
data.value: These settings affect metadata downloads (book descriptions, genres, Wikidata labels) and how dates and times are displayed throughout the Dashboard.

data.name: ServerGeneral_CountryHelper
data.value: Used for regional store lookups (e.g. Apple API)

data.name: ServerGeneral_LanguageChangeNotice
data.value: Changing the language will reload the page to apply the new UI locale.

data.name: ServerGeneral_SaveError
data.value: Failed to save settings. Check the Engine connection.

data.name: Vibes_PageDescription
data.value: Mood and atmosphere tags the AI draws from when enriching your library.

data.name: Vibes_InfoAlert
data.value: The AI can generate tags outside this list but prefers these. Edit freely â€” changes take effect on the next enrichment run.

data.name: Vibes_NoTags
data.value: No tags â€” add one below.

data.name: Wikidata_PageDescription
data.value: Wikidata is the sole identity authority for your library. Every book, film, person, and franchise is identified by a Wikidata Q-identifier. Stage 2 resolves identity during ingestion; Stage 3 enriches your library's universe in the background.

data.name: Wikidata_Stage2Description
data.value: Runs immediately after retail providers (Stage 1) deposit bridge IDs. Resolves the Q-identifier and fetches core properties via the Data Extension API.

data.name: Wikidata_AutoAcceptThresholdDescription
data.value: Reconciliation score at which a QID match is accepted automatically. Scores below this go to the review queue.

data.name: Wikidata_ReviewThresholdDescription
data.value: Minimum score for a match to appear in the review queue at all. Matches below this are discarded.

data.name: Wikidata_MaxQidCandidatesHelper
data.value: How many Wikidata candidates are shown in the review queue for manual selection.

data.name: Wikidata_WikipediaMaxCharsHelper
data.value: Long descriptions are truncated to this length before being stored as a metadata claim.

data.name: Wikidata_Stage3Description
data.value: Runs in the background after Stage 2 completes, or during the nightly sweep. Populates the Chronicle Explorer with deep universe relationships.

data.name: Wikidata_BackgroundIdleDelayHelper
data.value: How long the Engine waits after the ingestion queue empties before starting Stage 3 processing.

data.name: Wikidata_NightlySweepCronHelper
data.value: Standard 5-field cron expression in your local timezone. Default: 2 AM daily.

data.name: Wikidata_RelationshipDepthDescription
data.value: How many hops the Engine follows when building the universe graph. Depth 1 = direct relationships only. Depth 3 = grandparents, sub-factions.

data.name: Wikidata_LoreDeltaLabel
data.value: Auto-check Lore Delta on Chronicle Explorer open

data.name: Wikidata_LoreDeltaDescription
data.value: Detects when Wikidata has updated information about your universe since the last enrichment pass.

data.name: Home_EmptySubtitle
data.value: Drop files into your Watch Folder, or seed the library with sample books to get started.

data.name: Home_SeedSuccess
data.value: 7 books are being processed â€” they'll appear here momentarily.

data.name: Home_SeedFailure
data.value: Could not seed the library. Make sure the Watch Folder is configured.

data.name: Search_Subtitle
data.value: Use the search bar above to find books, audiobooks, and comics.

data.name: Provider_LanguageStrategy_Help
data.value: Controls whether this provider queries in your metadata language, English, or both.

data.name: Wikidata_Stage3RefreshDaysHelper
data.value: Re-check entities enriched longer than this many days ago.

data.name: Wikidata_Stage3TriggerHint
data.value: Manually start a Stage 3 enrichment sweep

data.name: TopBar_EngineDegradedBanner
data.value: Engine is degraded. Some screens may be incomplete.

data.name: Listen_QueueEndsWithCurrent
data.value: The queue ends with the current track.

data.name: Listen_HistoryEmpty
data.value: Played tracks will appear here for this session.
